items.text:
Tasweer Aur Tassawur

Kbb tkk dekhu ye tasweer-e-tassawur¹ teri?
Pooch lu kya abb tujhse haal tera,
Ankhon pe parda daal kr ghumta hu,
Taaki mil naa jaay koi muqabil² tera?

Shikayat krti ghumti ho meri,
Kya itna bura tha akhlaq mera? 
Haa Kuch the bure ravaiyya mere,
Pr kya abb tkk maaf naa kiya tumne,
Kya itna chota hai dil tera?

Kabhi tu bhi sochti hogi chupke,
Ki kis kadar pareshan tha yaar tera;
Main khud ko jeet bhi jaaun toh kya,
Haar jaata hoon jab bhi naam aai tera.

Nazaare badalte rehte hain sahab,
Par na badla kabhi intezaar mera;
Tu ruswa³  ho gayi hogi kisi baat se,
Par tha hamesha saaf dil aur iqraar mera.

Main aaj bhi unhi raaston par ruk-ruk kar saans leta hoon,
Jahaan pe rukna kabhi aadat thi intezar tera;
Tu sochti hogi shayad kissa khatam ho chuka h, 
Magar abhi tak ruka hi nahi woh raasta mera.


Duaon mein aaj bhi teri khair hi nikalti hai,
Chahe toot gaya ho har ik rishta-e-karar⁴ mera;
Tu bas ye jaan le — mohabbat na kam hui, na miti kbhi,
Bas badhta hi gaya waqt ke saath nasha tera.


1) Imagination me banni hui koi tasveer ya manzar.
2) Saamne aane wala ya opponent, jo mukabala kare.
3) Badnaam ho jaana, sharminda ya beizzat ho jaana.
4) Sukoon dene wala rishta, jisme araam aur chain milti ho.

Intezaar-e-Chandni

Milega kya usko accha mujhse koi,
Likhe jo raaton ko panna gine bagair,
Isme bhi keh do bekaar ghumta hu,
Uspr likhne ko mai kaam bolta hu.

Baithi hui h khafa aaj mujhse to kya?
Kal to paas mere baithi hui thi naa,
Manana usko mushkil nhi h, Magar,
Baat krne ko pahaad bolta hu.

Hrr shaam tanha aftaab¹ ko dhalte dekh kr,
Meri baatein soch kr Khilkhilati hogi,
Meri chandhni meri baton pr aaj bhi muskurati hogi.


Hojaay naraz kitna bhi, Magar,
Raat ko sone ko lethti hogi, 
To mujko yaad to krti hogi,
Milne ko raazi nhi to kya?
Apne khwaab me paas mere hi baithti hogi.

Aayega din wo jbb ek-duje ke saamne honge,
Bina bole hi batein saari krenge,
Thoda ladd bhi lenge gussa bhi dikhaigen mazaak bhi udaaige, Maafi bhi manguga mai,
Lekin phir saath hum nibhaigen.



1- Sun

Khayalon Ki Mehfil

Har shaam mere aankhon mein itraate aa jati ho,
har shaam mere dil ko behlaane aa jati ho,

bin bulaaye khayalon ki mehfil mein tum,
khamoshi se har baat sunaane aa jati ho,

jo likh na sakun lafzon mein main apna dard,
tum aankhon se woh sab jataane aa jati ho,

main jo khud se bhi kabhi chhup jaata hoon,
tum sach ban ke mujhe pehchaane aa jati ho,

waqt ke saath jo zakhm pade the dil par,
tum un par apni baatein lagaane aa jati ho,

jab bhar jaati hai rooh bhi tanhaiyon se,
tum mehsoos ban ke samjhaane aa jati ho,

main jo thak jaaun duniya ke shor se,
tum sukoon ban ke sarhaane aa jati ho,
na sawaal, na shikayat, na koi shart,
bas apni si ek muskaan dikhane aa jati ho,

kabhi yaadon ke saaye, kabhi khwabon ke rang,
meri har tanha raat sajaane aa jati ho,

Arsh ne chaaha bhula dena tumhein magar,
tum har koshish pe aur gehraane aa jati ho.

Shaam-e-Beqarari

Hrr shaam mere hi ankho me kyu aati ho?
Hrr shaam mujhe hi kyu behlati ho,
Raatein meri to leli ho sbb,
Abb din bhi lena chahti kyu ho.

Muskurata nhi abb asaani se mai,
Phir naam apna laati kyu ho?
Mera Hogya h haal kuch iss qadar 
Ki haath bhi mera aur gaal bhi mera,

Smjhna h mujhe meri parchai bnn gai ho tum yaa apna saya bna liya mujko,
Bhool gai ho tum mujhko ya sirf itraati ho,

Naraz ho to keh do mujhse,
Pehle bhi manaya h,
Boli band h jo teri mere khwabon pr wo tala h,

Khud se ladta hoon main, jeet bhi jaata hoon,
Phir meri jeet pe kyu muskuraati ho?

Agar anjaam hi likhna h judaai ka,
To ibtidaa me mujhe khwab kyu dikhaati ho?

Dil ke veerane me chup-chup ke kyu gaati ho?
Meri khamoshi ko har roz kyu sunaati ho?

Thak ke bhi main tera hi khayal rakhta hoon,
Tum meri har thakaan ka sabab kyu ban jaati ho?

Main jo likhta hoon dard kagaz ke hawale,
Tum har misre me chupke se utar kyu jaati ho?

Jawab chahiye the, sawal hi reh gaye,
Tum baatein adhuri kyu chhod jaati ho?

"Arsh" kehta hai, shikwa bhi ibadat jaisa
Phir bhi tum har dua me kyu yaad aati ho?

Yaad-e-Khuda

Zindagi guzregi intezaar me hi,
Hum ne maana bhi to tha tumko khuda jaise.

Dil ko rakha tha teri yaad ke pehlu mein magar,
Toot kar bikhar gaya aaina jaise.

Tum ne dekha bhi nahin mud ke kabhi haal mera,
Hum khade reh gaye dar par koi dua jaise.

Raat bhar jaag ke socha ki bhula dein tum ko,
Neend aati hi nahin koi saza jaise,

Hum ne chaha tha tumhein aakhri had tak lekin,
Tum badalte hi rahe rang-e-hawa jaise.

Ek muddat se teri yaad ka mausam hai yahan,
Dil pe chhayi hui rehti hai koi ghata jaise.

Tum mile bhi to ajnabi ki tarah milte rahe,
Koi milta hai bichhad kar bhi paraaya jaise.

Dil ko taskeen bhi milti nahin tere bin ab,
Zakhm rehta hai hamesha hi hara jaise.

Umr bhar tujko joda khud ke naam se hum ne,
Aur tu bhool gaya koi khata jaise.

'Arsh' hum us ke the, ye baat use yaad na thi,
Hum ne maana tha use apna khuda jaise.

Sardi-e-Hijr

Chal rhi h January din hue h chaar,
Bichde tujhse hua ek arsa kya milne ke h din paas?

Kadke ki thand h pr jal rha hu mai,
Naa jane kaun kr rha hoga tujhse baat.
Raat bhi beqarar hai,
Seene ke andar phir bhi ek aag barkarar h

Abhi hua bss saal ek jbb baitha krte the hum dono paas,
Aag jalti thi paas mein, haath bhi jal jaatay the,
Phir bhi teri qurbat mein lagti thi sardi bekaar.


Khamosh galiyon mein teri hi aahat ka khayaal hai,
Har simt tera zikr, har saans pe tera ikhtiyaar hai.

Tu khush hai kahin aur, yeh soch ke chup hoon main,
Warna abhi bhi dil karta hai kar loon izhaar.

Waqt ne jo cheena hai, uska bhi aik waqar hai,
Dard hi sahi lekin yeh bhi tera hi  ata-kardaar¹ hai.

Arsh ke liye yeh ishq sirf aik khayaal nahi,
Chhoot kar bhi jo saath rahe, wahi asal pyaar hai.

1-The gift of character

Khamosh Yaadein

Khamoshi bhi aaj kuch kehne lagi hai,
Teri yaad phir se dil mein rehne lagi hai.

Shehar ke shor mein khud se mulaqat hui,
Ye tanhaai bhi kuch sach kehne lagi hai.

Tu jo door hai phir bhi mehsoos hoti hai,
Har saans teri hi khushboo lene lagi hai.

Raat aankhon pe jab dheere se utarti hai,
Neend khwabon ka bojh sehne lagi hai.

Hum ne maana ke bhulana bhi hunar hota hai,
Par ye aadat hi dil me rehne lagi hai.

Waqt ke saath jo bhar jaate the zakhm aksar,
Ab har ek chot hi gehri rehne lagi hai.

Log kehte rahe sabr se milti hai raahat,
Par ye raahat bhi ab bojh si lagne lagi hai.

Main jo hansta hoon mehfil mein aadat ke liye,
Ye muskurahat bhi abb sbko jhooth si lagne lagi hai.


Arsh ne chaha ke shikwa bhi na likhe kabhi,
Par ye ghazal khud hi sach kehne lagi hai.

Adhoori Ibaadat

Teri sanson ki mujhko aisi aadat h,
Jo puri na hoski whi ibaadat h,
Shaant hogya hu kuch iss qadar main,
Jaise samundar bin machliyon ke ho.

Hrr sheher hrr gali hrr dukaan hrr nukkad pe puchna,
Ki 'Arsh' h Ishq mera ya h sirf gila,
Sbka jawab hoga bss yhi ki puchti kyu ho jbb sunna nhi bura.

Fasi h teri rooh bhi yhi,
Pr anaa bhi nhi tujko aur jana bhi nhi,
Rehti kaise ho tum mere bina?
Yeh soch bhi ab meri roz ki aadat hai,

Kya raat bhi kathti hai meri hi tarah,
Ya neend tujhe ab aasaani se mil jaati hai,
Main jaagta hoon har ek khayal ke saath,
Aur teri khamoshi meri sabse badi shikayat hai.

Tu kehti thi waqt sab kuch theek kar deta hai,
Par mera waqt toh bas teher gaya,
Jo chala gaya woh laut-ta nahi kabhi,
Aur jo reh gaya woh sirf ek aadat hai.

Log kehte hain bhool jaana hi behtar hai,
Par bhool paana bhi har kisi ki qismat hai,
Kuch rishte likhe jaate hain is andaaz me,
Jo poore na ho kar bhi poori zindagi ki zaroorat hai.
 
'Arsh’ ke naam pe likhi yeh jo adhuri si baat hai,
Wahi dard meri pehchaan, wahi meri har ghazal ki shuruaat hai.

Veeran Dil

Dil ka veeran yeh ujra hua ghar hai
Har taraf phaila hua dard ka manzar hai

Raat chup-chaap meri neend chura leti hai
Jaise palkon pe koi khwab ka lashkar hai

Us ki aahat pe dhadak uthta hai dil baar-baar
Is qadar dil pe abhi us ka hi asar hai

Hum ne chaha tha jise jaan se badh kar lekin
Wohi ab rooh mein utarta hua khanjar hai

Dil ko behla ke bahut dekh liya hum ne magar
Is seene mein wahi zakhm-e-jigar hai

Shehr bhar dhoondh liya chain ka har ek nishan
Har taraf phaila hua dard ka manzar hai

Arsh likhta raha tanhaai mein jo soz-e-dil¹
Aaj mehfil mein wahi baat sukhan-parvar² hai


1- Dil ka Dard
2-Jo sher ko parwan chadhaai, (basically logon ko baat acchi lge)

Chala Jaunga

Dil ke veeran chaman mein ek sada banke chala jaunga,
Khwaab ki toot-ti kirchon¹ ka pata banke chala jaunga.

Meri khamosh tabiyat ko samajh paaye na jo ahl-e-nazar²,
Unhi alfaaz ki teh mein koi ma‘na banke chala jaunga.

Gardish-e-waqt mujhe mitti mein mila bhi degi ek din,
Phir bhi mitti ki tarah har soo bikhar ke chala jaunga.

Tum samajhte ho meri yaad bhi dhundhli hogi ek roz,
Main ragon mein koi mehsoos sa nasha banke chala jaunga.

Shab-e-tanhaai agar dil ko kabhi gher ke baithe tumhare,
Chaand ki sard si kirnon mein chhupa chala jaunga.

Dil ke sheeshe pe kabhi naqsh jo tha naam mera,
Usi toote hue har aks mein rehta chala jaunga.

Main musafir hoon, meri manzil bhi safar hi nikli,
Jis taraf dard bulaye ga udhar chala jaunga.

Bazm-e-duniya³ mein agar zikr kabhi aaye mera,
Ek khamosh si aahat ki tarah chala jaunga.

Yaad rakhna ke meri rooh ka rishta hai gehra,
Halki hawaon mein ghuli ek dua chala jaunga.

Aur jab daur-e-zamana meri kahani sametega,
Main muskurata hua sab se juda chala jaunga.

Arsh apni hi sadaon se kabhi laut ke aayega kya,
Poochta reh jayega jahaan aur woh chala jaunga.


1-chota chota tukda
2-Samajdaar
3-Gathering

Qaid-e-Qalb

Khud ek saiyaad¹ hokr bhi tera shikaar maloom hota hu,
Musannif bhi, mukhtasar bhi, thoda magroor bhi maloom hota hu.

Kya bana diya mujko?
Abb sbse mukhtalif maloom hota hu,
Loog kehte hai pehle mujhme ek noor tha,
Abb kya gubaar² maloom hota hu?
Kuch ko to mohabbat ki misaal maloom hota hu.

Wo to mujhe tumne apne ankhon se shikast kr Qaid-e-Qalb³ krliya,
Magar Aaj bhi inn maslumon ko zakhmi sher maloom hota hu,
Tu khole zanjeerein meri to batunga inhe ki 'Arsh' kis qadar baitha h anjaam ke liye,

Kyu rookti ho mujhe insaaf ke liye?
Tawwakkul ki Daleel mtt do mujhko,
Hrr sbr ka ajr accha nhi hota, 
Hrr kisi ke saath Allah nhi hota.

Tum acchi ho accha sochti hu,
Magar, Hrr soch ka ikhtemam⁴ accha nhi hota,
Mai jaisa tha waisa chodh deti mujhko,
Kyu banana tha accha mujko,
Kiya tha irada to kyu chodh gai beech me hi,
Kya tumko pta nhi beech ka Insaan accha nhi hota.

Hai Mohabbat mujko tujhse,
Teri zindagi me to bss ek raahi maaloom padta hu,
Kyu krti ho shikayat bhi meri aur ki banti ho wakeel bhi meri?
Tere liye to mai bss farsh pr giri ek boond maloom padta hu.



1- Shikari.
2-dust.
3-heart under captivity.
4-Ending.

Be Sadaa Zindagi

1)
Roo rha hu pr ankho se nhi,
Beh raha hai pr ashk nhi.

2)
Jee rha hu pr Zindagi nhi,
Raste me hu pr manzil nhi.

3)
Keh rha hu pr lafz nhi,
Bol rha hu pr kisi se nhi.

4)
Loog bahut hai pr akele hu,
Garm hu pr bimaar nhi.

5)
Hass raha hu pr wajah nhi,
Seh rha hu pr ye saza nhi.

6)
Likh rha hu pr ye Ghazal nhi,
Sun to rhe ho pr kya mai Fazal nhi?

7)
Nasha to hai pr kiska hai jiska hai wo kiska hai?
Kambhakt, mai yaha khel rha hu lafzo se aur haar rha hu apno se.

Haal-e-Dil

Hum hans ke sab se milte hain, dard chhupa reh jaata hai
Dil bolna bhi chahe to aksar bin-alfaz reh jaata hai

Log poochte hain haal-e-dil, hum keh dete hain sab theek hai
Sach kehne ka jo hausla hai, woh dil mein daba reh jaata hai

Raaton ko fikr ki baarish mein khud ko bhigote rehte hain
Subah hote hi har gham bas aadha sa reh jaata hai

Arsh likh kar apna dard kuch lamhon ko halka kar leta hai
Warna jo seene mein tootta hai, woh dard til-milahat me reh jaata hai

Kuch rishte sirf aadat ban kar zindagi mein aate hain
Jaane ke baad bhi unka nishaan gehra reh jaata hai

Humne maangi thi bas thodi si chain-o-sukoon ki saans
Par is shor bhari duniya mein dil tanha reh jaata hai

Bad Hogaya

Gila hai mujhe mere Rab se yahi,
Uska mere dil mein aana bad ho gaya.

Marr jana behtar tha mera,
Unke paas jana bad ho gya,

Sukoon ki niyyat se jo khola tha dil,
Wahi har roz ka bahana bad ho gaya.

Main khud hi samajh leta, agar waqt deta,
Par ek pal mein har faisla bad ho gaya.

Jo cheez sirf mehsoos honi chahiye thi,
Usey lafzon mein laana bad ho gaya.

Woh acchi thi, main bhi bura nahi tha magar,
Dono ka saath nibhaana bad ho gaya.

Ab na shikwa hai usse, na khud se koi,
Bas ek galat mod pe aana bad ho gaya.

Ab dua bhi adhoori si lagti hai aksar,
Alfaaz wahi hain, par asar bad ho gaya.

Jo khamoshi kabhi ibadat hua karti thi,
Wahi khamoshi ka bojh safar bad ho gaya.

Seekh yeh mili ke har roshni rehmat nahi hoti,
Kuch charaagon se hi andhera ghar bad ho gaya.
 
Ab yaqeen bhi sambhal-sambhal kar rakhta hoon,
Har sach pe aitbaar karna bad ho gaya.

Jo Rab se shikwa tha, woh khud se jaa mila,
Insaan ko pehle samajhna bad ho gaya.

Na woh khwab galat the, na meri chaahat,
Bas unka ek saath chalna bad ho gaya.

Kuch raaste sirf dikhne ko hote hain apne,
Un par chal ke hi palatna bad ho gaya.

Waqt ne chupchaap sab hisaab barabar kar diya,
Bas jo dil mein rehna tha, woh dar bad ho gaya.

Phir samjha ke har haar shikast nahi hoti,
Kuch jeet ka bhi pehlu fanaa bad ho gaya.

Jo toot ke bikharne lagta tha muqaddar,
Wahi mujhe jodne ka zariya bad ho gaya.

Dil ne jo seekha dard ke madrasay mein,
Woh ilm kisi kitaab se ada bad ho gaya.

Jis cheez ko main apni pehchaan samjha tha,
Us se juda hona hi pehla qadam bad ho gaya.

Ab khud se mulaqat mein darr kam sa hai,
Par khud ko jhoothi tasalli dena bad ho gaya.

Jo reh gaya andar, usay chup hi rehne diya,
Har dard ko sabit karna bad ho gaya.

Ab zinda hoon, magar zyada ehsaas ke saath,
Shayad isi ka naam sambhalna bad ho gaya

Ab dua maangte hue bhi sambhalta hoon haath,
Har tamanna ka maqsood bad ho gaya.

Jin jawaabon pe zindagi tik gayi thi meri,
Waqt ke ek sawaal se sab bad ho gaya.

Sach ko seedha hi keh deta tha jo kabhi,
Ab wahi lehja mera bad ho gaya.

Dil ko aadat thi gehraiyon mein rehne ki,
Shehar-e-shor mein rehna bad ho gaya.

Jo tha bas ek kahani tak mehdood kabhi,
Uska har zakhm ab kitabon me bad ho gaya.

Main jo chup tha toh samjha gaya be-khauf sa,
Bol utha toh har andaaz bad ho gaya.

Aur phir aaina bhi sawaal karne laga mujhse,
Apni nazron mein aana hi bad ho gaya

Jo ghomta tha tere ird-gird,
Abb teri gaali se guzarna bad hogya

Yeh jo sab theek lagta hai, bas aadat ka dhoka hai,
"Arsh" ka khud pe yaqeen karna bad ho gaya.

Sab kuch keh ke bhi jo keh na saka main kabhi,
Usi khamoshi ka bojh "Arsh" abb bad ho gaya.

Main apne hi sawalon mein qaid hota chala gaya,
Aur jawaabon se bhi darna "Arsh" bad ho gaya.

Waqt ne mujhe mujh se hi rubaroo kar diya,
Ab apni hi nazron mein aana "Arsh" bad ho gaya.
 
Main jis ko zindagi samajh ke pakad baitha tha,
Us se chhoot ke hi jeena "Arsh" bad ho gaya.

Yahan har chehra jawab maangta rehta hai mujh se,
Is bheed mein khud ko bachana "Arsh" bad ho gaya.

Main thehra raha toh bhi mujrim hi tehra,
Har faisle ka bojh uthana "Arsh" bad ho gaya.

Jo dil ke andar rehna tha, woh panno pr aa gaya,
Aur phir likh kr chup rehna "Arsh" bad ho gaya.

Khud apni hi adalat mein jab faisle hue,
Be-gunaah rehna bhi namumkin "Arsh" bad ho gaya, 

Jis sach pe main zinda tha, usi sach se milna "Arsh" bad ho gaya bad ho gya.

Justuju

Tum paas ho ke bhi
itni bechain kyun ho

Khamosh lamhon mein
yeh guftagu kyun ho

Aankhon ne keh diya sab
phir aarzu kyun ho

Dil raaz-daan hai jab
itni pareshaani kyun ho

Mil kar bhi jo na poora ho
aisi kami kyun ho

Main ruk gaya hoon yahin
tum be-khudi¹ kyun ho

Saath chal ke bhi aksar
raahon mein tanhaai kyun ho

Wahi ek chehra hai phir bhi
dil ko nayi si kyun ho

Bina bichhre hi hum mein
yeh doori pehle si kyun ho

Arsh is sawal mein h
tum hi meri justuju kyun ho

1- Behosh / hosh khona

Hum Kaun

Aap poochti hain humein muskura kar, jaan kar Hum Kaun
Hum bhi chup rehte hain apni had jaan kar Hum Kaun

Aapki narm-e-guftagu ne baat ko gehra bana diya,
Warna log keh dete hain bina pehchaan ki Hum Kaun

Aapke lehje mein jo ehtiraam mehsoos hua,
Usne hi samjha diya humein zubaan ki Hum Kaun

Aap agar door reh kar bhi qadr karti hain,
Toh paas reh kar bhi shor karein — Hum Kaun

Aapke shehar mein rawaiyat abhi zinda hai,
Yahaan rishton ko naapte nahi daam pe — Hum Kaun

Aap ne jab sawal ko bhi adab se rakha,
Hum kaise jawab banein be-imaan ki Hum Kaun

Aap ke saamne sir jhukana kamzori nahi,
Yeh andaaz hota hai khud pehchaan ki Hum Kaun

Aap agar khamoshi ko bhi samajh leti hain,
Toh alfaaz ka bojh uthayein bayaan ki Hum Kaun

Aap se baat kar ke yeh yaqeen sa ho gaya,
Mohabbat hoti hai pehli imtihaan ki Hum Kaun

Aap ne izzat di, hum ne had na paar ki,
Isi liye alag khade hain is bheed mein — Hum Kaun

Arsh ab apni wazahat¹ hum khud nahi dete,
Woh jo samajh sake adab se, wahi jaane — Hum Kaun

1- Clarity

Khawabon ki Mulakat

Yun mere khwabon me anaa abb to chodh do,
Yun mujhko behkana abb to chodh do.

Muskura kr dekhti ho?
Yaa dekh kr muskurati ho?
Kya pata tum bhi mera mazaak udaati ho.

Nigah ghadi pr rehti thi mujhe dekhne ke liye,
Abb khud ki ziyarat ko tarsati ho.

Yaad h? Batati thi saare dard mujhko,
Abb mujko hi dard batati ho.

Kehne ko to mai aaj bhi tumhara nhi,
Mgr sunne ko aaj bhi tumhara hu.

Aao baitho baat kro mujhse,
Phir to jaanogi mai sirf tumhara hu.

Abb mujhse milna bhi tum munasib nhi smjhti,
Kya mai tujko abb hara hu?

"Arsh" se poochte h sbb haal uska,
Aao tum bhi to dekho ishq me kamaal uska.

Hawaon ka Sawaal

Abb to hawa bhi jo to teri galyaron se hokr aati h,
Wo bhi tera haal mujhko nhi btati,
Ulta poochti h tujhko khabar kya h.

Tum kya poochti ho mujhe dikkat kisse h,
Mujhe dikkat unn hawau se h unn fizao se unn pani ke katro se bhi h jo tujhe Chuu kr guzarte h.

Teri khamoshi bhi ab shor macha jaati hai,
Har ek yaad teri, raaton ko jaga jaati hai,
Main so bhi jaun agar, khwaab mein aa jaati hai.

Raat bhar teri yaadon ka silsila chalta rehta hai,
Har ek lamha bas tera hi zikr karta rehta hai,
Ye tanha sa dil sirf tera hi intezaar karta rehta hai.

Tu door hoke bhi itni qareeb kyun lagti hai,
Har saans mein teri hi khushboo kyun basti hai,
Ye mohabbat bhi na jaane kaun sa raaz rakhti hai.

Agar tu mil jaaye to shikayat bhi na rahe,
Agar tu saath ho to koi zarurat na rahe,
Bas teri ek muskurahat, phir koi hasrat na rahe.

Ab to is dil ko sukoon sirf tera naam deta hai,
Warna ye dard bhara safar har mod pe ilzaam deta hai.

Ab to is ishq ka anjaam bhi tu hi ban jaa,
Meri har shuruaat ka har ek mukaam bhi tu hi ban jaa.

Arsh, tera zikr-e-yaar hi teri ibaadat hai,
Isi mein teri zindagi, isi mein teri mohabbat hai.

Tera Naam

Har dhadkan ki sada banke basa hai tera naam
Raat ke tanha lamhon ka sahara tera naam

Kabhi chaand bhi ho jaaye be-rang zara
Phir nazaron ki chamak ban ke ubharta tera naam

Saanson ki wafaaon mein mehakti si hawa
Aur us har ek jhonke pe likha hai tera naam

Khwaabon ko agar jagah kam pad jaaye kabhi
Main dil rakh doon, magar rahe upar tera naam

Samjha na paaya kisi ko tere hone ka asar
Khamoshi bhi ho toh lab tak pahunchta tera naam

Duaon mein, kabhi aansuon mein rukta hua
Har soorat mein Rab se maangta hoon tera naam

"Arsh" ne ishq ki kitaab mein bas yahi likha
Har she’r ka, har lafz ka matlab tera naam

Roshni

Usse dekha toh lage jaise hawa bhi muskura rahi ho,
Dil ek pal mein badal kar naya geet gaa rahi ho.

Uski aankhon mein utar jaaye to duniya narm pad jaaye,
Khud se bhi zyada kisi aur ko samjha rahi ho.

Har pal uske saath ho toh waqt thoda theher jaaye,
Har mushkil apna bojh peeche hi chhod ja rahi ho.

Uske bina sab theek bhi ho toh theek nahi lagta,
Jaise zindagi adhoori si kahin thak ja rahi ho.

Mohabbat naam ka ehsaas tab samajh aata hai,
Jab dua khud uski hifazat mein badal ja rahi ho.

Woh hanse toh uljhe raaste saaf ho jaate,
Jaise zameen pe khwab ka naya rang chodh ja rahi ho.

Main bewajah sa jeeta tha, usne wajah bana di,
Har din mere liye ek nayi roshni jagaa rahi ho.

Usse kho na doon yahi darr dil mein rehta hai,
Kyuki lagta hai zindagi meri usme samaa rahi ho.

Baaton mein uski ek sharafat sa chhupa hota,
Jaise mohabbat izzat ka libaasa pehna rahi ho.

Agar kabhi wo pareshan ho toh aasmaan bhi ro de,
Usey hassane ko hawa bhi geet suna rahi ho.

Arsh ke khwaabon mein uske chehre ki roshni basi rahe,
Jaise chandni raat bhar pyaar ka raaz chhupa rahi ho.

Uski Zulfein

Uski zulfein jab bhi chehre se guzar jaati hain,
Dil ki bechain si halat ko sanwar jaati hain.

Raat tanha ho to baalon ki mehak yaad aaye,
Khwaab ban kar meri aankhon mein utar jaati hain.

Wo jo zulfon ko halka sa jhatak deti hai,
Saari duniya usi lamhe mein thehar jaati hain.

Uski zulfon mein chhupa dard bhi apna sa lage,
Talkh yaadein bhi wahan aa ke bikhar jaati hain.

Chaand bhi dekh ke jalta hai siyahi unki,
Roshni sharm se khud piche hat jaati hain.

Arsh likhta hai magar baat wahin aa ke ruke,
Uski zulfein hi ghazal ban ke ubhar aati hain.

Bala-e-Ishq

Ishq ek bala h mera to yhi gila h,
Utre ye Kalmeh se kalam me zehen se badan me,
Ho agr ek tarfa to nikle na kai arsa,
Kuch me to itna nibhai ki qabr tk saath jaay,

Chakha h maine bhi isko,
Shuru me to dil behlaay, Dunya ko hi jannat ye banai,
Phir insaan isko khoon bhi pilaay aur paas bhi baithaai,

Ho agr ye do tarfa to tufaan se bhi lada de, darya me bhi tehelwa de,
Taqat dein ye itni ki insaan dunya ko aag lagai,
Ek rootha to doosra manata h usko,
Hota nhi asaan nibhana isko,


Chakhna tha mujko isko,
Magar, chaha nhi usne aur tukhra diya mujko,
Hai gila bhi iska,
Lekin hu akele nhi abb bhi saathi mera ishq h,
Ye jaay ga qabr tk saath mere lekr naam uska.

Teri Talaash

Kya raat ke sannate se milta hai koi asar?
Ya har sadaa mein reh jaati hai sirf teri talaash

Kya shehr ke is hujoom mein milta hai tera nishaan?
Ya har chehra ban jaata hai ek dhoka-e-nazar, 

Kya waqt ke zakhmon se bhi bhar jaata hai yeh dard?
Ya umr bhar saath rehti hai be-sabar teri talaash

Arsh poochta hai khud se tanha raat ke safar mein—
Kya khud ko khona hi hai aakhri qadar,

Haan, raat sunti hai agar bolne ka ho hunar,
Har khamoshi mein chhupi hoti hai teri talaash

Haan, is hujoom mein bhi maujood hai tera wajood,
Bas chahiye aankhon ko gehri si nazar,

Nahin, yaadein nahin thakti, hum hi ho jaate hain be-asar,
Isi liye zinda rehti hai har pehar teri talaash

Raat ne Arsh se kaha aakhri lamhe ke safar par—
Khud se jo mil jaaye, usi ko milti hai uski talash.

Sajda-e-Ishq

Dil ne jo bhi khwab dekha, sach agar hua Toh
Raat bhar ka har andhera subah sa hua Toh

Khud se milne ka safar jab darmiyan kam hua Toh
Be-sabab jo dard tha woh bhi fana hua Toh

Teri khamoshiyon me baat yun ada hua Toh
Lafz bin kahe bhi har matlab bayan hua Toh

Waqt ke is shor mein sach bolna junoon hua Toh
Dar ke sheeshon se guzarna bhi asaan hua Toh

Waqt ke zulm ne thak kar ye maana
Zakhm reh kar bhi sila ban gaya Toh
Ishq ka bojh uthana hi ibadat hai
Dil ne sajde mein ye sar rakh diya Toh


Arsh ne khud ko mita kar jab likha ishq 
Har qalam ne maan liya, yehi khuda hua Toh

Lafz bhatak gaye hon agar ishq ke junoon mein 
Niyat gavaah hain ke imaan kabhi juda hua Toh

Niyyat pe jab yaqeen hai, phir gila kaisa
Imaan jahan ka wahan, ishq bas zariya hua Toh

Zillat-e-Ishq

Itni zillat se pesh aati ho,
Tum mere pyar ka fayda uthati ho,
Meri hi nazron me itna kyu mujhe girati ho,
Ankhon se kyu apne tum pani bahati ho.

Agar teri aankhein aam hoti phir kya,
Mere hathon me bhi jaam hoti,
Yeh Nasha hai sirf teri ankhon ka,
Agr abhi tuu mere paas hoti,
Tumhe dekhne me hi meri subh se shaam hoti.

Jbb se bichda hu tumse tumhari itni sifat¹ gini h,
Hai tumko banane wala naraz mujhse,
Ki, Itna usne tumko bnate waqt socha na tha.

Nah, sirf mai nhi darta guftugu krne se,
Tum bhi darti hogi, 
Khada h "Arsh" saamne jhuka kr nazar,
Iss baat pr tum bhi to mukarti hogi.

Kyu darti ho mujhse tum?
Hun naa shayateen² aai meri khawateen³,
Hai galti bss itni sii krne chala tha accha,
Pr, Bnn gya koi accha rha mai buraa.

Hatau inn baaton ko,
Bahut arsa hua mile humko,
Aao chlo milte h, theek phir tai hua.
Ho rhi h deer abb,
Chlo abb mai sone chlta hu.



1- Khoobi.
2-shaytan.
3- ladki.

Mai Shayar Nhi

Nhi hu Shayar mai,
Nhi aati shayri mujko,
Kyu krte ho meri ghazlon ki tareef,
Ye sbb bss mere mauzu¹ ka kamaal h.

Mauzu meri h ek ldki,
Thodi ziddi thodi kadki²,
Tareef kro tum uski jisne usko h banaya,
Mai to sirf hu zarya jo tareef fan³ ki kre.

Nhi hu mai shayar nhi aati shayri mujko,
Bss jbb wo dil ke galyaron se h guzarti,
kuch mudda chodh jati, mai bss bunta lafz usse,
Hai baat alag ye ki, rehti whi h wo,
Yun aana jana to lga h rehta.

Poochte ho tum likhte kyu ho itna,
Faltu nhi hu bss hogya hu dil-e-awaara⁴,
Hoti nhi Raton me baatein meri usse,
Mujhko to bss h iss kalam ka sahara.

Ho na zikr uska ghazlon me meri phir to,
Padhna h fizool tumhara waqt hoga sirf zaya,
Wo baat mere lafzo me nhi,
Wo baat h uske noor ki.

Mai to mai chodo,
Bina uske to meri tehreer bhi h kharij,
Chodh du kbhi likhna to ye smjh lena,
Bhool gya usko ya marr gya Ashiq.


1-Topic.
2-sakht.
3-Art.
4-restless heart.
5-tehreer- likhawat.

Dua-e-Firaq

Krta Nhi Dua mere liye koi,
Ki ho tum to Zaya nhi jaaygi,
Nhi mila haq to cheen lenge,
Haar kr bhi hum Jeet lenge...

Janti to ho ki ziddi hu mai,
Aur usko kuch khaas pasand nhi,
Kyu krti ho sifarish meri,
Maang leti naa apne liye kuch...

Haa ho acchi tum magar meri liye accha naa kro,
Hu bura insaan mai anjaane me kbhi dil dukha dunga...

Krti rho gi dua haar jaaugi,
Hogai dua qubool to kaha jaaugi,
Mai hu ek bura insaan kaha tha maine,
Nhi hui qubool to bura maan jaugi...

Mai Jee nhi pata aaj bhi bin tere,
Dam bhi ghuthne lga h abb mera, Magar,
Mai nhi Chahta ki ho dua kubool teri,
Mai nhi chahta ki paas aai tuu mere,

Mai nhi krta dua kbhi, Kyuki,
Nhi banti usse meri, pr maagta hu dua aaj mai bhi ek,
Krta hu guzarish aai sunle meri, ki
Mil jaay usko sbse behtar koi.

Saza-e-Ishq

Saza bahut si thi, par chun liya maine hi teri,
Na mumkin tha paana, phir bhi dhadkan bani teri.

Maloom tha anjaam, magar suna dil ne meri?
Kabhi to maan le gi tu Himmat-e-Kohsaan¹ ye meri.

Toot kar bhi khada hoon, bas ek aas hai teri,
Safar-e-ishq ka raahi hoon, manzil mile ya na mile teri.

Har mod pe roka dil ne, bola “kahan tak jaayega?”
Par ishq ne khamoshi se kaha— “jab tak saans chalegi, tab tak to jaayga.”

Aaj bhi sabr ki chaadar me lipta hoon main teri,
Kisi din hogi nazar-e-karam, aayegi khabar-e-meri… teri.

1) Pahad jaisi himmat

Junoon-e-Tamanna

Jo khwabon mein meri taraf muskurate hain,
Haqeeqat mein meri taraf dekhna bhi gawara nahi.

Kabhi chaandni mein thi baaton ki khushboo,
Ab chaand hai, magar woh nazara nahi.

Kabhi khat se mili thi khushboo wafaon ki,
Ab khat bhi hai, magar paighaam hamara nahi.

Dil raat bhar jaagta raha khwahishon ke liye,
Subah aayi, magar koi ishara nahi.

Maine dil se bulaya to hansi aayi unhein,
Shayad unke liye yeh junoon-e-tamanna nahi.

Khwabon ke nagar mein ab bhi muskurahatein hain,
Magar jaagti aankhon ka muqaddar sitara nahi.

Gila-e-Ishq

Haa hai gila mujhe tere naa hone kaa,
Magar, Mere hrr shai me tere hone ki tasdeek krta hu,
Hai Mohabbat ka asar tumme bhi,
Magar, haa zamane ko inkaar Krna bhi zaroori h...

Khair chodh, shikayton ke silsile to lge hi rhege, Tuu bta kya h haal tera,
Kyu sbb pooch rhe h abb marasim¹ hamara,
Dekhle naa dil kaa haal mera.

Jo toot kar bhi juda na ho, woh rishta dushwar hota hai,
Khafa tu jitna ho jaa, dil mera phir bhi wafadar hota hai.

Main chup ho jaaun to kehna mat ki jazbaat kam ho gaye,
Khamoshi ka bhi ek andaaz hai — lafzon se zyada bhari hota hai.

Log kehte hain ke bhool ja, par dil se kaise inkaar karun,
Teray naam ka ek lamha bhi poore din ka sahara hota hai.

Tu nazar andaaz kare chahe jitna, main phir bhi muḍ kar dekhun,
Mohabbat ka asli imtihaan hi yeh be-qarar sa hota hai.
